Document:
# Vulpkanin
Vulpkanin are canine-like humanoids, sporting distinct ears and tails. They see the world in reds and greens, deal [color=#ec3a3a]blunt [/color]and [color=#ec3a3a]slash [/color] damage with their claws, and their fur insulates them from environment temperature at the cost of making them 15% more vulnerable to Heat damage.
## Diet - Can eat raw meat.
- Cannot eat things containing Theobromine, such as chocolate.
## Benefits - Possess an acute [color=yellow]sense of smell[/color], allowing them to [color=#1e90ff]track scents[/color]. - Attack with [color=yellow]claws[/color], dealing [color=#ec3a3a]Blunt[/color] and [color=#ec3a3a]Slash[/color] damage.
## Drawbacks - Their insulating fur makes them [color=#ec3a3a]15% more vulnerable to Heat damage[/color]. - They have [color=yellow]Deuteranopia[/color], seeing the world differently from most species.
([color=#8658fc]This can be turned off in accessibility settings[/color].)
- [color=#ec3a3a]Cryogenics cannot be used to heal them[/color], as they cannot cool down enough to enter stasis.
